description_long: This house features a single-story, L-shaped layout with a combination of exposed red brick and white plaster exterior walls. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces, which include visible living, kitchen, and bedroom areas. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections possibly accommodating rooftop utilities or access. The house includes a main entryway with a prominent door, and the presence of outdoor greenery such as palm trees and shrubs adds to its suburban character. The interior is partially visible, revealing modern furnishings and open-plan living spaces. The overall design suggests a blend of modern and traditional elements, suitable for an urban or suburban neighborhood.
description: A single-story, L-shaped house with red brick and white plaster walls, flat roof, large windows, and modern interior spaces. Outdoor greenery and asymmetrical window placement enhance its urban appeal.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with a central entry door, large windows, and a clear view into the living and kitchen areas.
description_view_1: This angle shows the side of the house with more windows, a visible bedroom, and outdoor greenery including a palm tree.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the L-shape, with a focus on the white-walled section and the rear rooms, as well as the flat roof.
description_view_3: This view reveals the back and side of the house, showing additional windows, a secondary entry, and more of the interior layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with a small step, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
